hero.title: AI-Powered Video Ads in Seconds
hero.subtitle: Generate stunning video ads from text prompts. No editing skills required.

generate.title: Create Your Video Ad
generate.promptPlaceholder: Describe your product or service... (e.g., 'Summer sale, 50% off everything')
generate.dragDrop: Drag & drop an image here, or click to browse
generate.imageToVideoHint: Your uploaded image will be animated into a dynamic video ad.
